# llms.txt — AI-Readable Site Summary
#
# Place this file at: public/llms.txt (accessible at yoursite.com/llms.txt)
#
# This file helps large language models understand your site's content.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org
# Generate robots.txt: https://geoscoreai.com/tools/robots-txt-generator

# Your Site Name

> Brief one-line description of what your site does.

## About

Provide a 2-3 sentence summary of your website, its purpose, and the type
of content visitors can find here. This helps AI engines understand context
and cite your site accurately.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://yoursite.com): Overview of the site
- [Blog](https://yoursite.com/blog): Articles and guides
- [Docs](https://yoursite.com/docs): Technical documentation
- [Pricing](https://yoursite.com/pricing): Plans and pricing
- [About](https://yoursite.com/about): Company information

## Key Topics

- Topic 1: Brief description
- Topic 2: Brief description
- Topic 3: Brief description

## Contact

- Website: https://yoursite.com
- Email: hello@yoursite.com
